revision.comment: Bot: Creating normal ill redirect for [[Category:Lua-based templates]].
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Module talk:Asbox stubtree]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:pages created from Interlanguage links]] [[ja:qq]]

revision.comment: Copying from [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] to [[Category:qq]]{{Hidden category}}[[Category:qq]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Module talk:Asbox stubtree]] [[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]] [[Category:qq]]{{Hidden category}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:pages created from Interlanguage links]] [[ja:qq]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude>"
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Module talk:Asbox stubtree]] <noinclude>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude> [[Category:qq]]{{Hidden category}}[[Category:qq]] [[Category:pages created from Interlanguage links]] [[ja:qq]]
#redirect[[:en:Module talk:Asbox stubtree]] <noinclude>[[Category:Automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude> {{Hidden category}}[[Category:pages created from Interlanguage links]] [[ja:qq]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Automatic wikipedia redirects
revision.text: #redirect[[:en:Module talk:Asbox stubtree]] <noinclude></noinclude> {{Hidden category}}[[Category:pages created from Interlanguage links]] [[ja:qq]]

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: remove deleted category Pages created from Interlanguage links

Bot: migrate talk page structure; import discussion seed (no qid-linked ja/en/simple source); add local discussion section + dated import note [[git:Emma-Leonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/22783740998|manual triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
{{talk page header}}
<!-- This talk page covers the main article and all associated namespace layers --> <!-- Imported from Japanese/English/Simple English Wikipedia talk pages on 2026-03-06 (UTC) when available. -->
== Local discussion == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:EmmaBot|EmmaBot]] ([[User talk:EmmaBot|talk]]) 22:47, 6 March 2026 (UTC) <!-- Add local discussion below this line. -->
== Initial import == :Dummy comment added by script to avoid immediate auto-archive of a fresh page.[[User:EmmaBot|EmmaBot]] ([[User talk:EmmaBot|talk]]) 22:47, 6 March 2026 (UTC) <!-- No source talk page found via linked QID sitelinks (ja/en/simple) at migration time. -->
